title: Evaluator Specification
description: Scoring definition (deterministic checks, schema validation, rubric/judge config)

metrics.description: Array of metrics produced by this evaluator.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the evaluator.

config.description: Configuration specific to the evaluator type, such as model details or target values.

metric_versions.description: Mapping of metric names to their semantic versions.

digest.description: SHA-256 hash of the evaluator content.
